title: Bloomy Wooden Tools Compatibility
description: An extension mod for the Bloomy Mod pack, allowing Biomes O' Plenty be compatible with Wooden Tool Variants.
body:
# What is Bloomy Wooden Tools Compatibility?
Bloomy wooden tools compatibility is a mod built for the [Bloomy Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bloomy-modpack) that fixes a crucial issue when using the [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) mod and the [Wooden Tool Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/wooden-tool-variants) mod together.
This issue being that when [Wooden Tool Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/wooden-tool-variants) is installed it being impossible to make any wooden tools with any of the new wood types provided by [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty).

# How does Bloomy Wooden Tools Compatibility work?
Bloomy Wooden Tools Compatibility solves this issue by expanding on what [Wooden Tool Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/wooden-tool-variants) already does, this being making custom items for each wood type. In total this comes down to about 65 new wooden tools of 13 different wood types all originating from [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty).

![A screenshot of minecraft showing a showcase of different Biomes O' Plenty woods, and tools with the same colors made with those woods.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb6f65c79af5b1e23fedae62477b8e9b60e8599.webp)
